properties:
Brassica turbonis, also known as Turonian mustard plant, is not well-documented in modern literature, but based on its botanical classification, it shares some potential therapeutic properties similar to other Brassica species.

Like many Brassica plants, Turonian mustard may contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which could contribute to its potential therapeutic effects.
